title: archive-hint.cjs 文案改造 — 跨会话计数 + 项目级欠债 wording
description: Replace the existing single-line archive trigger reason with a multi-line message that explicitly communicates: (1) this is cross-session accumulated debt, not current-session activity; (2) the user MAY ignore if current session has no产出; (3) 12h cooldown applies. Decode session_id from events.jsonl events when present; degrade gracefully to '跨多个会话' wording when most plan_context events lack session_id. Add bilingual support per existing fabric_language config. Also fix Q3.8 gap: when watermark not found (rotation cut off knowledge_proposed), use the first event ts as virtual watermark instead of treating hours-elapsed as null forever.

files.target: decide() function (L148-L189) reason field construction (around L185-L188)
files.change: (1) Replace single-line reason with bilingual two-line copy. zh-CN: `跨 ${N} 个会话累计 ${plan_context_count} 次 plan_context · 距上次归档 ${hoursDisplay} — 这是项目级长期欠债, 不一定来自本会话。\n若本会话有产出, 可调用 fabric-archive; 否则可忽略, 12h 后再提醒。`. en: parallel wording. (2) When session_id field missing on most events (>50%), substitute '跨多个会话累计' for '跨 N 个会话累计'. (3) When lastProposedTs is null (rotation cut watermark), use events[0].ts as virtual watermark and append '(watermark 已被 rotation 清理)' suffix. (4) Read fabric_language from .fabric/fabric-config.json (consistent with existing CONFIG_FILE pattern at L26) to choose zh-CN vs en variant; default en when missing.

files.target: new test file (or extend existing archive-hint test if present)
files.change: Add test cases: (1) events with session_id present → reason contains '跨 N 个会话' with correct count; (2) events without session_id → reason contains '跨多个会话累计'; (3) lastProposedTs=null + rotation scenario → reason contains 'watermark 已被 rotation 清理'; (4) en variant when fabric_language='en'; (5) zh-CN variant when fabric_language='zh-CN'; (6) existing cooldown behavior unchanged (regression check).

implementation: Read archive-hint.cjs in full to ensure understanding of decide() + readLedger() shape.
Add helper function countDistinctSessions(events, lastProposedTs) returning {count, coverage_ratio} where coverage_ratio = events_with_session_id / total_events.
Update decide() reason construction: branch on language, conditionally use distinct-session count vs '多个' phrase based on coverage_ratio >= 0.5.
Add fallback for null lastProposedTs: use events[0]?.ts when count-based trigger fires.
Snapshot the new wording in tests via the 6 cases above.
Manual smoke test: run with sample events.jsonl fixtures, verify stdout JSON shape unchanged (still {decision: 'block', reason: '...', signal: 'archive'}).

reference.pattern: Hook fail-silent + JSON stdout pattern (rc.2 KT-DEC-0009 single-cjs-hook); fabric_language detection per .fabric/fabric-config.json (existing precedent)
reference.examples: banner-i18n.cjs already implements zh-CN/en branching in cjs hook context — copy structure.

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure文案 + helper extraction (no schema change, no trigger logic change). Bilingual via existing fabric_language detection. Graceful degrade when session_id missing maintains backward compat with pre-TASK-02 events.
alternatives_considered: Full C-scheme double-AND session_ready trigger (rejected: complexity, deferred per Q2)
Drop session count entirely (rejected: weakens user understanding)
Hard-fail when session_id missing (rejected: violates fail-silent)
decision_factors: Minimal change addresses cognitive错位 root cause
Graceful degrade required for transitional period before TASK-02 fully effects AI behavior
rationale.tradeoffs: Hint will still fire on new sessions with no current activity (S1 痛点 not structurally fixed); but user reads the new wording and understands '这是项目级债务, 可忽略', reducing perceived noise.

manual_checks: Run archive-hint.cjs with hand-crafted events.jsonl having mix of session_id present/missing
Verify zh-CN output renders correctly in actual Claude Code Stop hook
success_metrics: Existing cooldown tests still pass (regression check)
unit: archive-hint.test degrade to '多个' on missing session_id

criteria: archive-hint.cjs contains string '项目级长期欠债'
archive-hint.cjs has fallback path when lastProposedTs is null using events[0].ts
archive-hint.test.ts contains ≥6 test cases (grep test names)
Commit msg: 'feat(rc25): archive-hint copy + cross-session count + watermark fallback (TASK-03)'
